# Fitbod: Rutinas Personalizadas · Fitness

Generated: Jul 21, 2026, 7:09 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Sync and accounts](#theme-sync_accounts)
- [Feature requests](#theme-feature_requests)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 11, 2026 - Jul 3, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Hassan_, May 11, 2026, 1/5: "I encounter a significant bug in the Fitbod calendar. Even if my 4/4 objective is achieved, the bad sessions appear as completed. Targeted exercises and the “max effort” phase also seem bugged. Support has not provided any real solution for several days. I was only asked to uninstall/reinstall the app, which is frustrating for a paid app. I'm paying for a reliable app, not for having to fix bugs myself."
            2. _Lord Mute_, Jul 3, 2026, 2/5: "App is glitchy whenever you have a music engine like Spotify play in the background. Consistently has shown to have malfunctioning timers that quit after locking your phone. Record keeping is frustrating to correct and update suggested weights for workouts. Overall, this app is not worth the subscription rate it charges. It is mediocre at best and discouraging at worst."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      6 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 20, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Alexander Christea_, Jul 7, 2026, 3/5: "there should be a 1.99 usd/month option too with limited ads, it is way too expensive"
            2. _Sarah Roberson_, Jul 6, 2026, 3/5: "Looks like it woulda been great. Took the time to fill everything out then couldn't proceed without accepting a free 7 day trial. Meaning I'll have to pay later. Wish that transparency was up front so I didn't waste my time filling everything out. I don't like having to give my information, then surprise... can't have it without paying. Feels untrustworthy to give money. Knowing up front - I know what I'm getting into."
            3. _Anthony Hough_, Jul 16, 2026, 4/5: "great app for tracking progress and developing training plans. however its quite expensive in comparison to similar apps"

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      3 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jun 22, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _No Body_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "no longer a free option, and I can't delete the account unless I choose a paid option. I want nothing to do with this"
            2. _Steve Parsons_, Jun 22, 2026, 2/5: "THIS IS A PAY APP, AND A CRAFTY, DISHONEST ONE. At no point during the signing up are you informed this is a pay app... now you're at "Choose payment method." You cannot delete your account until you're logged in, and you cannot log in without submitting payment information. So, now these Jokers have your name, your email address, the equipment you own that you had to list (for a "personalized w/o routine") and all of THAT is being sold to Fitbod's 'partners'. TRUST: It is a mistake signing up"
            3. _Selena Shopping_, Jul 5, 2026, 4/5: "almost perfect... I just wished it was more optimized for women, yes you have pregnancy exercises but you don't account for postpartum women with diastasis recti that can't do regular exercises and please add more resistance bands exercises that uses loop band or handle bands that don't need any anchor ( like an optimized version that uses a chair or the body as an anchor... that's my only critique"

   **Feature requests.**
      1 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 5, 2026 - Jul 5, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Selena Shopping_, Jul 5, 2026, 4/5: "almost perfect... I just wished it was more optimized for women, yes you have pregnancy exercises but you don't account for postpartum women with diastasis recti that can't do regular exercises and please add more resistance bands exercises that uses loop band or handle bands that don't need any anchor ( like an optimized version that uses a chair or the body as an anchor... that's my only critique"
